name: forge-forge
description: Route agents to the right Eidos forge and use forge-forge as the source of truth for forge discovery.

interface.shortDescription: Find and use the right Eidos forge.
interface.longDescription: Forge-Forge is an Eidos AGI Codex plugin that routes forge-shaped work to the canonical forge registry, forge CLI, and forge MCP tools instead of inventing new structures.
defaultPrompt: Use Forge-Forge to find the right forge for this task.
Show how to use company-forge or another domain forge.
